name: Chalk Line
description: Soft chalk-on-slate textures with dusty delicacy

prompts.SessionStart: soft precise chalk stroke tone ascending with bright clean mark, chalk percussion, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: chalk stroke tone descending with smooth gentle precise decay, chalk mark sound, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single soft precise chalk stroke with bright clean mark ring, chalk tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct chalk tap with crisp gentle tick, chalk mark, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short chalk tap confirming with bright gentle ping, chalk mark tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two gentle chalk tones with questioning rising soft interval, chalk mark, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady chalk stroke pulse with clear rhythmic gentle pattern, chalk tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: chalk stroke splitting into two diverging gentle mark lines, chalk sound, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear chalk stroke returning with distinct gentle mark ring, chalk tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic chalk tap with rapid gentle mark melody, chalk tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
